__fixture_tag__: VENDORED UNIVERSAL-FF PREDICTION — frozen NNP output, not measurement
target_property: superconducting transition temperature T_c for magic-angle twisted bilayer graphene (TBG) at twist angle 1.08° in an hBN-encapsulated dual-gated stack

operating_conditions.gating: dual-gate (top + bottom) for independent carrier-density + displacement-field control

model_caveat: Universal FFs predict atomistic energies / forces on the moiré-superlattice geometry — they do NOT directly compute T_c (a many-body correlated-electron property of the magic-angle flat band, requiring strong-coupling Hubbard / pseudogap / BCS-BEC crossover treatment). The 1.7 K value here is a PROXY-from-literature pinned with raw#10 C3 honesty: Cao 2018 Nature first-reported MA-TBG superconducting onset. SEMI-QUANTITATIVE — NNP frames the moiré-lattice relaxation geometry only.
proxy_source: Cao et al. 2018 Nature 556:43 (magic-angle TBG superconductivity at 1.7 K, half-filling of flat band, twist angle 1.05-1.10°, Jarillo-Herrero MIT); Cao et al. 2018 Nature 556:80 (correlated insulator phase, same TBG device family); Lu et al. 2019 Nature 574:653 (TBG superconducting dome extension); Andrei / MacDonald 2020 Nat. Mater. 19:1265 (TBG review); Yankowitz / Dean Columbia + Efetov Barcelona TBG corpus 2019-2024
falsifier_text: superconducting T_c < 1.5 K OR twist-angle precision worse than 0.1° across device → FAIL
delta_to_target_twist: PASS only if precision ≤ 0.1° (UNVERIFIED for non-tear-and-stack devices)
unproven_markers_preserved: flat-band TBG twist-precision UNVERIFIED preserved verbatim — twist drift / relaxation / lattice reconstruction routinely degrades effective twist at 0.1° precision
TBG twist-angle precision HARD_WALL at 0.1° across whole-device area — Cao 2018 + Lu 2019 measure local probes, device-scale uniformity UNVERIFIED
superconducting fraction depends on hBN encapsulation cleanliness UNVERIFIED at wafer scale
non-zero-field-cooled / cycling reproducibility UNVERIFIED — TBG SC sample-dependent (5-20 % of fabricated devices show SC)
device-layer integration + scalable fabrication → hexa-chip per CROSS_LINK §3.2; tear-and-stack remains a Jarillo-Herrero lab specialty
no claim of RT-SC (per AGENTS.md A4 + `hexa-rtsc` boundary)
honesty_caveats: T_c 1.7 K CLEARS the 1.5 K floor at Cao 2018 magic-angle device chemistry. The twist-precision arm of F-FLATBAND-1 is the binding falsifier — ≤ 0.1° across-device precision is UNVERIFIED at production. PASS on T_c alone does NOT close the candidate; the twist-precision UNVERIFIED marker stays in place. SPEC_FIRST preserved — does NOT promote to EXTERNAL-VERIFIED.
license_note: Peer-reviewed paper values per Nature publisher terms; Jarillo-Herrero MIT + Andrei Rutgers lab authority (raw#10 C3, NOT n=6 lattice-fit).
